data.title: Write failing structural test for cross-epic scan integration
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing shell test `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh` that asserts the structural boundaries of the cross-epic interaction scan integration before any implementation files exist.

**Test file**: `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh`

**Given/When/Then**:
- Given: the brainstorm SKILL.md, cross-epic-scan.md prompt file, and cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md agent file
- When: the test script is executed
- Then: all structural boundary assertions pass (files exist, required content present)

**Assertions to include**:
1. `plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md` exists
2. `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/cross-epic-scan.md` exists
3. `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains a reference to `cross-epic-scan.md` between Phase 2 Step 2 and Step 2.5 markers
4. `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/cross-epic-scan.md` contains "No open epics — scan skipped" (N=0 behavior)
5. `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/cross-epic-scan.md` contains batch size 20 reference
6. `plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md` contains all four tier names: benign, consideration, ambiguity, conflict

**RED marker**: Update `.test-index` to add a RED marker for this test function before committing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh
- [ ] Running the test produces at least one FAIL before implementation files exist
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL\|not found\|No such"
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker for the new test function
  Verify: grep 'test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) after implementation completes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
